description: Amazon S3 is Amazon Web Services' object storage service for storing and retrieving data as buckets and objects. The `com.s3.amazonaws.com` domain is associated with the S3 service endpoint family used for programmatic object storage access.
summary: Amazon S3 exposes a REST HTTP API plus AWS CLI `s3` and `s3api` command surfaces, authenticated with AWS SigV4 using AWS access-key credentials.

surfaces.name: AWS CLI low-level S3 API commands
